name: default_office_audit_policy
description: Default public policy for Office parity audits. It accepts exact or normalized matches plus reviewed, versioned drift entries and requires explicit review for all remaining drift.

accepted_differences.reason: Reviewed v0.0.2 workbook drift: the generated XLSX preserves the canonical nine-sheet app-native workbook contract with ID/Label columns, while the legacy source workbook omits those helper columns.
